vision.body: No more waits, calls or stress. Discover and book the best beauty and wellness services straight to your door, in seconds. Almost every industry has gone digital. Beauty has been still too long. Glamro is here to change the rules of the game.

pros.ecosystem: Not just a platform. An ecosystem for beauty professionals.
pros.ctaTitle: Become one of the first GlamPros
pros.ctaSubtitle: Join the community redefining beauty in Italy.

about.title: We're rewriting the rules of beauty.
about.lead: Glamro was born from real, everyday needs: packed schedules, clients who can't find professionals on-site for ceremonies or special occasions, and an industry still too fragmented and under-digitized.
about.leadExtra: We imagined something different: bringing beauty into the future. Not just a booking app, but a platform that connects people and professionals, makes services more accessible and creates new opportunities for the entire industry.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: To build the digital infrastructure of beauty & wellness, connecting clients and professionals, simplifying access to services and helping make the industry more modern, transparent and merit-based.
mission.extra: We want to value talent, foster professional growth and help bring more structure and opportunity to an evolving market.

opportunity.title: More than a platform. An opportunity to grow.
opportunity.body: Glamro isn't just here to bring clients to professionals — it's here to help them truly grow.

highlights.title: More earnings
highlights.desc: New bookings and new clients, every day.

highlights.title: More visibility
highlights.desc: A personal brand that grows inside and outside the app.

highlights.title: More freedom
highlights.desc: Work how, where and when you want.

opportunity.body2: We want to offer professionals opportunities that go beyond a single service: building their own personal brand, gaining visibility on social media, accessing training and selling courses in the future, working in exclusive contexts like events, hotels and destination weddings — even turning their craft into a path that can take them to travel and grow professionally.
opportunity.closing: For us a professional isn't just a service provider. They are a talent to be valued.

items.title: Quality
items.desc: Only verified and selected professionals.

items.title: Trust

items.title: Simplicity

items.title: Innovation
items.desc: Technology at the service of people.

items.title: Growth
items.desc: For clients, professionals and the entire industry.

outro.title: From professional to brand. From service to career.
outro.body: We don't just want to change the way beauty services are booked. We want to help build the future of the industry.

items.a: Glamro is Italy's first beauty delivery: a platform that lets you book verified beauty professionals — hairdressers, barbers, estheticians, make-up artists and massage therapists — right where you want, in just a few taps.

items.q: When will the app be available?
items.a: Available from May 1, 2026 with the official launch across Italy.

items.q: In which cities will it be available?
items.a: Available across Italy from launch, with progressive expansion of the professionals' network.
Hair, barber, beauty, make-up, massages and services for events and ceremonies, at home or in the location of your choice.
Professionals are verified through onboarding, documentation and profile review, also supported by community reviews.

items.q: I'm a professional, how can I join?
items.a: You can apply via the GlamPro app, complete your professional profile and submit the required documentation to access the platform.
Secure digital payments directly in-app, with a simple, transparent system for clients and professionals.
Yes, you can select the professional based on reviews, availability, distance and price.

items.q: Can I book for hotels, events or special occasions?
items.a: Yes, Glamro is built to bring beauty services wherever you need them, including events and special locations.
Yes, the professional comes to the location you indicate.

items.q: How can I become one of the first GlamPros?
items.a: Sign up via the app and request priority access to the platform.

items.q: Can I book on weekends or extended hours?
items.a: Yes, availability depends on the professionals on the platform.
Yes, prices and services are transparent before confirmation.
